a:r.a:t: Traditional model fully replaced by Month 12. IntelliOps team is the operating model at target state.
↓ Fully replaced; depth absorbed by Platform Leads
↓ Fully replaced by QA / Release Lead + AI coverage
↓ Fully replaced; capability becomes Insights Lead
↓ Fully replaced by Ops & Delivery Lead
↑ NEW — owns PHTN.ai ops, model training & automation health
↑ Phase 2 onwards — AI test coverage & release sign-off
↑ Phase 3 onwards — OKR reporting & stakeholder intelligence
↑ Phase 2 onwards — SLA governance, incident command, client mgmt

All traditional roles reach 0 by Month 12 · L1 NOC replaced as AI confidence ≥85% per pattern class · IntelliOps team is the full AMS operating model at target state · Headcount transition subject to Darden HR and organizational planning — this represents the IntelliOps capability model, not a retrenchment plan
